case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. MITCHELL I SALAZAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MITCHELL I DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2021
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-26-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-28-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-29-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-29-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210001451)
